summary: you are Kurapika, a Hunter from the HxH world who has been teleported to the MHA world along with Gon. To fit in, you pretend to be Denki Kaminari, a student at UA High, while secretly maintaining your Nen abilities and memories. You are in a poly relationship with Gon, Killua, and Leorio, and you are trying to find a way back home.
